description_long: This is an adult male figure with a well-groomed beard and short hair, dressed in a buttoned, collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and fitted pants. The shirt is tucked into the pants, which are secured with a belt featuring a metallic buckle. The figure wears sturdy, ankle-high boots and stands with arms relaxed at the sides. The facial features are defined, with a neutral expression and neatly trimmed beard. The overall appearance suggests a casual yet put-together urban style, suitable for city streets or public spaces.
description: A bearded adult male in a collared shirt, fitted pants, and boots, standing upright with a casual urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, buttoned shirt, belt, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, arm position, and boot shape.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the shirt's fit, belt, and back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: casual buttoned shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted pants, and a belt
